import requests
from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class StripePayment:
    id: str
    amount: int
    currency: str
    status: str


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class StripeWebhookEvent:
    event_type: str
    payment: StripePayment
    customer_id: str


def parse_stripe_payment(event_id: str) -> StripePayment:
    resp = requests.get(f"https://api.stripe.com/v1/events/{event_id}")
    raw = resp.json()["data"]["object"]
    return StripePayment(
        id=raw["id"],
        amount=raw["amount"],
        currency=raw["currency"],
        status=raw["status"],
    )


def parse_webhook_event(payload: dict) -> StripeWebhookEvent:
    obj = payload["data"]["object"]
    return StripeWebhookEvent(
        event_type=payload["type"],
        payment=StripePayment(
            id=obj["id"], amount=obj["amount"], currency=obj["currency"], status=obj["status"]
        ),
        customer_id=obj["customer"],
    )


def process_webhook(payload: dict):
    event = parse_webhook_event(payload)
    save_transaction(event.event_type, event.payment.amount, event.customer_id)
